frontmatter.description: Landing a 1-D spacecraft with InfiniteOpt.jl: decision variables, dynamics, boundary conditions, path constraints, and an objective.
frontmatter.title: 1. The Anatomy of an Optimal Control Problem

frontmatter.description: A real engine cannot throttle to zero. The feasible set becomes a ring with a hole — and a beautiful relaxation repairs it, losslessly.
frontmatter.title: 2. Nonconvexity and the Lossless Trick

frontmatter.description: The full Blackmore 2013 powered-descent problem: mass depletion, glide-slope cones, and a landing you can fly with sliders.
frontmatter.title: 3. Landing on Mars in 3-DoF
